message:
test: add comprehensive unit tests for rotation and state packages

- rotation package (6 tests):
  - GetProvider function for all agent types
  - ClaudeProvider, CodexProvider, GeminiProvider implementations
  - Provider interface compliance and consistency checks

- state package (35+ tests):
  - Schema types and constants (SessionStatus, AgentStatus, etc.)
  - Store operations (Open, Close, Migrate, Transaction)
  - CRUD for all entities (sessions, agents, tasks, reservations,
    approvals, context packs, tool health, events)
  - Migration reading and idempotency
  - Event replay functionality

Closes ntm-3dx8 (Missing Package Test Coverage epic)
Closes ntm-cm0q, ntm-bs4k
